name: Sunny Sharma
summary: Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience in Java (Spring Boot, Spring Security, Microservices) and JavaScript (MERN/Next.js). Built and deployed production-grade applications featuring real-time communication (WebRTC, Socket.IO), blockchain integration (Solidity/Ethereum), ML-powered features, and live-streaming infrastructure. Seeking a Java Full-Stack or Backend Developer role to build scalable, high-performance systems.
shortBio: I build things that scale. From real-time collaborative editors to blockchain-based platforms, I love tackling complex engineering problems with clean, maintainable code.
